title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER B — Eva solo dance with brave coin
prompt: Wide low-angle music-video shot in @Image1 — sea-turtle floor mural visible, the giant white molar-tooth chairs in soft focus background. @Eva stands ON TOP of one of the giant tooth chairs, holding a shiny gold @Image2 high in one hand like a trophy, the other arm out for balance. Eva spins on the spot, then bops side-to-side, hair bouncing, beaming so wide her whole face is grinning, mouth moving rhythmically as she sings along to a song. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: spin → bop-left → bop-right → coin-pump-up → return-to-start. Camera slowly orbits at kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful warm lighting. Solo shot — only Eva visible, no other people, no other faces, no dialogue (music-video beat), no audible speech, generic happy singing-along mouth movements. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly: Eva returns to roughly the same coin-held-high pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible music — silent render.
